name: skills
description: Ultra Skills packages a sharper local Codex skill arsenal for workflows, reviews, docs, and role-driven execution.

interface.longDescription: Ultra Skills packs this repo's skills, role lenses, and workflow harnesses into one local Codex plugin: terse by default, critical when needed, and built for real implementation and review loops.
defaultPrompt: Pick the sharpest skill for this task.
Run a hard review with the right role lens.
Turn this rough workflow into a usable skill.
